special_mechanics.name: Force Device
special_mechanics.description: Selectable Force unit that provides distinct weapon sets and special enhancements. Three variants available: Standard Force (Round Force), Shadow Force, and Cyclone Force

special_mechanics.name: Wave Cannon Charging
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon system with red-blue-yellow charging states. Full charge produces massive beam that passes through enemies and obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Hyper Wave Cannon Mode
special_mechanics.description: Alternative weapon mode with rapid-fire capability. Shots create damaging explosions. Causes ship to overheat after short duration, requiring cool-down period during which wave cannon is inoperative

special_mechanics.name: Bit System
special_mechanics.description: Collectible units that spin around ship and provide enhanced visual/combat effects when Hyper mode is active with one or two Bits collected

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and weapon systems but contain no quantified physics parameters (no movement speeds, gravity values, acceleration rates, or sub-pixel precision data). Game functions as side-scrolling shooter with ship-based player movement rather than traditional platformer physics
sources_used: wikipedia - R-Type III: The Third Lightning gameplay section
